definitions.text: Greatly diminished size or form; reduced scale.
A small version of something; a model of reduced scale.
examples: There was a miniature of a whaling ship in a glass bottle over the mantelpiece.

definitions.text: A small, highly detailed painting, a portrait miniature.

examples: I find miniature dogs annoying; they seem to yap more than full-size dogs.

definitions.text: To make smaller than normal; to reproduce in miniature.
